I gave an physical interview for the first time.

We had given a coding assignment. 

We want to see how you work with modern tools. You are required to use an AI coding assistant (like Cursor or Antigravity) for this assignment.

The "AI Operating System" instinct is right.

Claude Code now works over iMessage. Text your AI coding assistant from your iPhone — full terminal access, file reading, code search. 3-minute local setup, no cloud. The gap between thinking about code and talking to your AI about code just disappeared. #ClaudeCode #iMessage

If you use more than one AI tool, you're re-explaining yourself every single conversation. Your coding agent doesn't know what your mobile assistant discussed yesterday. Every session starts cold.

Engram fixes this — it's an open-source memory layer that sits between all your AI https://t.co/XUQMIAaWIr

What is System Prompt ?
Ans. A System Prompt defines the behaviour, roles and rules of the AI Model.
Ex :- You are a helpful coding assistant.
It basically controls :- Tone , Style and Boundaries.

I've been wanting a personal AI assistant that can do everything (coding, message, do tasks, etc).

The thing is, I have a weak PC and no idea where to start. Can someone give me something?

💻 Spent the morning testing a new AI coding assistant… and it actually predicted a bug I hadn’t even noticed yet. Feeling like the future of programming just walked into my IDE. https://t.co/l2u5tCny4R

Every AI coding assistant has the same flaw.

It never asks "wait, am I sure about this?"

⸻

Your agent refactors a function. Looks great. Ships it. Breaks 3 tests because it didn't check what happens with null input.

It was confident. It was wrong.

This happens because AI

Hot take: Your AI coding assistant has amnesia.

Every session starts from zero. It forgets your architecture. Your conventions. The bugs you already fixed.

We built something to fix that. More soon.

urls.title: Subagents, Skills, and Image Generation · Cursor
urls.description: Agents are solving increasingly complex, long-running tasks across your codebase. This release introduces new agent harness improvements for better context management, as well as many quality-of-life fixes in the editor and CLI. Subagents are independent agents specialized to handle discrete parts of a parent agent's task. They run in parallel, use their own context, and can be configured with custom prompts, tool access, and models. The re sult is faster overall execution, more focused context in your

I built a fully local AI coding assistant — Epsilon IDE Engine v2

No APIs. No cloud. Runs entirely on your machine.

Here’s how it works 🧵

Most developers are using Claude Code wrong.

They treat it like a coding assistant:

Prompt → Output → Repeat.

That works… until it doesn’t.

Because real AI development isn’t about prompts.

It’s about systems.

Here’s the Claude Code setup that changes everything 👇

Not “AI assistant.”

The shift is simple:
AI is moving from tool to teammate.

Small businesses will want the same thing next.
